---
title: "Content Collection"
format:
  html:
    theme: default
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: setup

library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)

# Read collection config from environment variable
config_json <- Sys.getenv("COLLECTION_CONFIG", "{}")
config <- tryCatch(
  fromJSON(config_json),
  error = function(e) list()
)

# Defaults
collection_title <- config$title %||% "Content Collection"
collection_description <- config$description %||% ""
collection_intro <- config$intro_markdown %||% ""
collection_theme <- config$theme %||% "minimal"
collection_source_type <- config$source_type %||% "manual"
collection_source_tag <- config$source_tag %||% ""
collection_guids <- config$guids %||% character(0)

# Connect API setup
connect_server <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_SERVER", "")
connect_api_key <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_API_KEY", "")

fetch_content <- function(guid) {
  tryCatch({
    resp <- request(paste0(connect_server, "/__api__/v1/content/", guid)) |>
      req_headers(Authorization = paste("Key", connect_api_key)) |>
      req_url_query(include = "owner") |>
      req_perform()
    resp_body_json(resp)
  }, error = function(e) {
    list(guid = guid, title = guid, description = "", app_mode = "unknown",
         last_deployed_time = "")
  })
}

fetch_content_by_tag <- function(tag_name) {
  tryCatch({
    # Use the search endpoint with tag filter
    resp <- request(paste0(connect_server, "/__api__/v1/search/content")) |>
      req_headers(Authorization = paste("Key", connect_api_key)) |>
      req_url_query(
        q = paste0("published:true tag:", tag_name),
        include = "owner",
        page_size = 100
      ) |>
      req_perform()
    result <- resp_body_json(resp)
    result$results %||% list()
  }, error = function(e) {
    list()
  })
}

# Resolve content items
if (collection_source_type == "tag" && nchar(collection_source_tag) > 0) {
  items <- fetch_content_by_tag(collection_source_tag)
} else {
  items <- lapply(collection_guids, fetch_content)
}

# Theme colors
theme_colors <- list(
  warm = list(bg = "#fffbeb", accent = "#d97706", border = "#fde68a", text = "#92400e"),
  cool = list(bg = "#eff6ff", accent = "#2563eb", border = "#bfdbfe", text = "#1e40af"),
  minimal = list(bg = "#fafafa", accent = "#525252", border = "#e5e5e5", text = "#404040"),
  fun = list(bg = "#fdf2f8", accent = "#db2777", border = "#fbcfe8", text = "#9d174d"),
  bold = list(bg = "#eef2ff", accent = "#4338ca", border = "#c7d2fe", text = "#3730a3"),
  earth = list(bg = "#f0fdf4", accent = "#15803d", border = "#bbf7d0", text = "#166534")
)
colors <- theme_colors[[collection_theme]] %||% theme_colors$minimal

# Content type labels
type_labels <- list(
  "shiny" = "Shiny", "rmd-shiny" = "R Markdown", "rmd-static" = "R Markdown",
  "static" = "Static", "api" = "Plumber API", "jupyter-static" = "Jupyter",
  "python-api" = "Python API", "python-dash" = "Dash", "python-streamlit" = "Streamlit",
  "python-bokeh" = "Bokeh", "python-panel" = "Panel", "python-fastapi" = "FastAPI",
  "quarto-shiny" = "Quarto", "quarto-static" = "Quarto", "python-shiny" = "Shiny for Python",
  "jupyter-voila" = "Voila", "python-gradio" = "Gradio", "proxied" = "Proxied"
)

format_type <- function(mode) {
  type_labels[[mode]] %||% mode
}

format_date <- function(dt) {
  if (is.null(dt) || nchar(dt) == 0) return("")
  format(as.Date(dt), "%m/%d/%Y")
}

content_url <- function(guid) {
  paste0(connect_server, "/content/", guid, "/")
}

owner_name <- function(item) {
  # Owner may be nested list, flat fields, or absent
  tryCatch({
    owner <- item$owner
    if (is.list(owner)) {
      first <- owner$first_name %||% ""
      last <- owner$last_name %||% ""
    } else {
      first <- item$owner_first_name %||% ""
      last <- item$owner_last_name %||% ""
    }
    trimws(paste(first, last))
  }, error = function(e) "")
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat(sprintf('<style>
body {
  background-color: %s;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
}
.collection-header {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 2rem 0;
}
.collection-title {
  font-size: 1.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111;
  margin: 0;
}
.collection-description {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  color: #666;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.collection-panel {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 1.5rem auto;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid %s;
}
.collection-intro {
  border-left: 4px solid %s;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.collection-intro h1, .collection-intro h2, .collection-intro h3 {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.collection-intro p { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.collection-intro a { color: %s; }
.collection-count {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #666;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.collection-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}
.collection-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid %s;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #111;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
}
.collection-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  border-color: %s;
}
.collection-card__title {
  font-size: 0.9375rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: %s;
}
.collection-card__description {
  margin-top: 0.375rem;
  font-size: 0.8125rem;
  color: #666;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  flex: 1;
}
.collection-card__meta {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #999;
}
.collection-card__type {
  background: %s;
  padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
  font-size: 0.6875rem;
}
.collection-card__owner {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #999;
}
#quarto-header, #quarto-footer, .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}
</style>',
  colors$bg,     # body background
  colors$border, # panel border
  colors$accent, # intro left border
  colors$accent, # intro links
  colors$border, # card border
  colors$accent, # card hover border
  colors$accent, # card title
  colors$bg      # card type badge bg
))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Build all HTML as a single string
html_parts <- character(0)

# Header
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<div class="collection-header">')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('<h1 class="collection-title">%s</h1>', htmltools::htmlEscape(collection_title)))
if (nchar(collection_description) > 0) {
  html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('<p class="collection-description">%s</p>', htmltools::htmlEscape(collection_description)))
}
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>')

# Intro panel
if (nchar(collection_intro) > 0) {
  intro_html <- markdown::markdownToHTML(text = collection_intro, fragment.only = TRUE)
  html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('<div class="collection-panel collection-intro">%s</div>', intro_html))
}

# Items panel
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<div class="collection-panel">')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('<div class="collection-count">%d item(s)</div>', length(items)))
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<div class="collection-grid">')

for (item in items) {
  guid <- item$guid %||% ""
  title <- item$title %||% item$name %||% "Untitled"
  description <- item$description %||% ""
  if (nchar(description) > 120) {
    description <- paste0(substr(description, 1, 120), "...")
  }
  app_mode <- item$app_mode %||% ""
  date <- format_date(item$last_deployed_time)
  owner <- owner_name(item)
  url <- content_url(guid)
  type <- format_type(app_mode)

  html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf(
    '<a class="collection-card" href="%s" target="_blank">
      <div class="collection-card__title">%s</div>
      <div class="collection-card__description">%s</div>
      <div class="collection-card__meta">
        <span class="collection-card__type">%s</span>
        <span class="collection-card__owner">%s</span>
        <span>%s</span>
      </div>
    </a>',
    htmltools::htmlEscape(url),
    htmltools::htmlEscape(title),
    htmltools::htmlEscape(description),
    htmltools::htmlEscape(type),
    htmltools::htmlEscape(owner),
    htmltools::htmlEscape(date)
  ))
}

html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>') # collection-grid
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>') # collection-panel

# Output as raw HTML via htmltools (Quarto respects this)
htmltools::browsable(htmltools::HTML(paste(html_parts, collapse = "\n")))
```
